title: Minecoins
body:
Minecoins is a mod that adds three types of coins as well as a wallet for storing them.
None of the four items can be obtained in survival, and the coins have no innate function, making this mod perfect for use on servers or in modpacks.
In Creative, the coins are in the Ingredients tab and the wallet is in the Tools & Utilities tab.
The wallet has 15 slots and can only hold items under the tag `minecoins:coins`, which by default only includes the three coins added by the mod.
While previous versions of this mod were written from scratch, I found that MCreator made things faster, so this version was made using it.
That's about it! Enjoy the mod!
